Start with a baseline observation and choose a variable to modify to see if it affects Y2.
Increase A to see if it affects Y2, then increase B to see if it affects Y2.
Y2 increases when A is increased, now let's see if B has an effect
Y2 increases when A is increased, but does not change when B is decreased, so A must be the determining factor.
A increases Y2 linearly, so the equation is Y2 = k * A
